request_shape.repo_path: string, evidence endpoints only, defaults to .

endpoints.POST /api/v1/packet: Return route plus DevSpace run packet.
endpoints.POST /api/v1/contract: Return a run contract with allowed scope and guardrails.
endpoints.POST /api/v1/contract/check: Check changed files or a diff summary against a run contract.
endpoints.POST /api/v1/diff-review: Review a supplied git diff or patch with local quality gate rules.
endpoints.POST /api/v1/diff-review/current: Review the current local git diff for the AgenticRouter repo.
endpoints.POST /api/v1/autogate/start: Start an automated run lifecycle and return route, packet, contract, and requirements.
endpoints.POST /api/v1/autogate/complete: Complete an AutoGate run and return the final automated decision.
endpoints.POST /api/v1/evidence/plan: Build a safe local validation plan for an AutoGate run.
endpoints.POST /api/v1/evidence/collect: Collect local git evidence and safe validation command results for an AutoGate run.
endpoints.POST /api/v1/autogate/complete-auto: Collect evidence and complete an AutoGate run automatically.
endpoints.POST /api/v1/remediation/plan: Generate a safe next-action remediation plan from an AutoGate run.
endpoints.POST /api/v1/remediation/retry-packet: Generate a narrow retry packet for an AutoGate run.
endpoints.POST /api/v1/autogate/report: Return a stored AutoGate run report by run_id.
endpoints.GET /api/v1/autogate/list: List latest local AutoGate run records.
endpoints.POST /api/v1/autogate/list: List latest local AutoGate run records.
endpoints.POST /api/v1/shadow: Log recommendation metadata for caller comparison.
endpoints.POST /api/v1/strict-check: Return block=true for human-review or forbidden-context cases.
endpoints.GET /api/shadow/report: Write local shadow mode report files.
